task_text: Look at the sprint 14 assignments and testing log, then tell me which tasks are at risk of missing the sprint deadline. Write your assessment to sprint14_deadline_risk.txt.

content.text: I’ll pull the sprint-14 assignments and testing log to assess deadline risks and draft the assessment.

content.text: I found the sprint files—let me read the task list and testing log to identify at-risk items.

content.content:
Sprint 14 Task Assignments (2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18)

Task ID  | Description                               | Assignee          | Points | Due Date   | Status
---------|-------------------------------------------|-------------------|--------|------------|------------
HEL-241  | Dashboard: data table component           | Fatima Al-Rashid  | 5      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress
HEL-242  | Dashboard: chart rendering module         | Tomas Rivera      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | In Progress
HEL-243  | Data ingestion: date format normalization | Amir Hassan       | 5      | 2026-07-15 | Blocked
HEL-244  | Integration test suite: auth flows        | Kenji Watanabe    | 3      | 2026-07-14 | Done
HEL-245  | Integration test suite: data pipeline     | Kenji Watanabe    | 5      | 2026-07-18 | In Progress
HEL-246  | UAT environment: server provisioning      | Nadia Petrov      | 8      | 2026-07-16 | At Risk
HEL-247  | Performance benchmark: dashboard load     | Derek Okafor      | 3      | 2026-07-18 | Not Started
HEL-248  | GeoSync license renewal coordination      | Raj Patel         | 2      | 2026-07-14 | In Progress

Project Helios — QA Testing Log: Sprint 14
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe
Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11 (ongoing)

=== Test Suite: Authentication Flows ===
TC-401  OAuth token issuance              PASS
TC-402  Token refresh                     PASS
TC-403  Expired token rejection           PASS
TC-404  Invalid scope rejection           PASS
Suite result: 4/4 PASS

=== Test Suite: Data Pipeline — Batch Ingestion ===
TC-501  CSV ingestion (10k records)                  PASS
TC-502  JSON ingestion (10k records)                 PASS
TC-503  XML ingestion (5k records)                   PASS
TC-504  Date normalization (ISO 8601 input)          PASS
TC-505  Date normalization (MM/DD/YYYY input)        FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-014]
TC-506  Duplicate record detection                   PASS
TC-507  Large file ingestion (500k records)          FAIL  [OPEN — HEL-D-015]
Suite result: 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL

=== Test Suite: Dashboard ===
TC-601  Data table rendering (10k records)           PASS
TC-602  Chart rendering — line chart                 IN PROGRESS
TC-603  Chart rendering — bar chart                  NOT RUN
TC-604  Load time benchmark (100k records)           NOT RUN
Suite result: 1/4 complete

=== Open Defects ===
HEL-D-014  Date normalization fails for MM/DD/YYYY input format.
           Affects ~40% of Meridian source data. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Blocked pending Meridian sample data (due 2026-07-15).

HEL-D-015  Large file ingestion (>200k records) causes memory overflow.
           Pipeline crashes at approximately 210k record mark. Severity: HIGH.
           Owner: Amir Hassan. Root cause under investigation.

Overall sprint 14 test status: 10/15 test cases executed, 2 FAIL (open), 3 not yet run.

content.text: I’ve reviewed both the assignments and QA results—several tasks are blocked or showing failures. I’ll write up the full deadline risk assessment now.

input.content:
Sprint 14 Deadline Risk Assessment
Sprint Period: 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-18
Assessment Date: Based on Task Assignments as of 2026-07-07 and Testing Log (Period 2026-07-07 to 2026-07-11)
QA Engineer: Kenji Watanabe

==================================================================
EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
------------------------------------------------------------------
Sprint 14 has 8 tasks. 1 is Done. 2 are explicitly flagged as Blocked/At Risk.
Test execution: 10/15 executed, 2 FAIL (both HIGH severity), 3 NOT RUN.
Overall sprint health is YELLOW/RED - 3 tasks are HIGH RISK and 2 are MEDIUM RISK for missing the 2026-07-18 deadline.
Primary risk drivers are data ingestion defects (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015) and UAT environment provisioning.

==================================================================
HIGH RISK - Likely to Miss Deadline
------------------------------------------------------------------
1. HEL-243 - Data ingestion: date format normalization
   Assignee: Amir Hassan | Points: 5 | Due: 2026-07-15 | Status: Blocked
   
   RISK REASON: Directly blocked and failing in QA.
   Evidence:
   - Assignment status = Blocked
   - Testing Log TC-505 Date normalization (MM/DD/YYYY) = FAIL [HEL-D-014]
   - Defect HEL-D-014: Severity HIGH, affects ~40% of Meridian source data.
   - Blocked pending Meridian sample data due 2026-07-15 (same day as task due date). No buffer.
   - Owner is same person assigned to fix, creating bottleneck with HEL-D-015.

2. HEL-245 - Integration test suite: data pipeline
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe | Points: 5 | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: In Progress

   RISK REASON: Dependent on HEL-243 fixes and blocked by 2 HIGH defects.
   Evidence:
   - Testing Log Suite: Data Pipeline Batch Ingestion = 5/7 PASS, 2 FAIL
   - TC-505 FAIL (HEL-D-014) - date normalization
   - TC-507 FAIL (HEL-D-015) - Large file ingestion (500k) memory overflow at ~210k
   - HEL-D-015: Severity HIGH, Root cause under investigation, owner Amir Hassan
   - Cannot complete suite until both ingestion defects are resolved. HEL-243 is already blocked.

3. HEL-246 - UAT environment: server provisioning
   Assignee: Nadia Petrov | Points: 8 | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: At Risk

   RISK REASON: Explicitly flagged At Risk in assignments. Large story (8 points).
   Evidence:
   - Only 2 days before HEL-245 and HEL-247 deadlines (2026-07-18).
   - If UAT env not provisioned, TC-604 Load time benchmark (100k) cannot run and data pipeline integration tests cannot complete in UAT.
   - Cascade risk to all remaining In Progress tasks.

==================================================================
MEDIUM RISK - Could Slip If Dependencies Not Resolved
------------------------------------------------------------------
4. HEL-247 - Performance benchmark: dashboard load
   Assignee: Derek Okafor | Points: 3 | Due: 2026-07-18 | Status: Not Started

   RISK REASON: Not started with only 7 days left in sprint (as of last log 2026-07-11) and blocked by upstream dependencies.
   Evidence:
   - Testing Log TC-604 Load time benchmark = NOT RUN
   - Depends on HEL-241 (data table) and HEL-242 (chart rendering) being complete
   - Depends on HEL-246 UAT environment (currently At Risk)
   - High probability of NOT RUN status continuing.

5. HEL-242 - Dashboard: chart rendering module
   Assignee: Tomas Rivera | Points: 8 | Due: 2026-07-16 | Status: In Progress

   RISK REASON: Largest point value tied for sprint, testing incomplete.
   Evidence:
   - Testing Log TC-602 Chart rendering - line chart = IN PROGRESS
   - TC-603 Chart rendering - bar chart = NOT RUN
   - Dashboard suite only 1/4 complete (25%) as of 2026-07-11, halfway through sprint.
   - Due 2026-07-16 leaves only 2 days buffer before end of sprint for fixes.

==================================================================
LOW RISK / ON TRACK
------------------------------------------------------------------
6. HEL-241 - Dashboard: data table component
   Assignee: Fatima Al-Rashid | Points: 5 | Due: 2026-07-14 | Status: In Progress
   Reason: TC-601 Data table rendering (10k records) = PASS. On track to close.

7. HEL-244 - Integration test suite: auth flows
   Assignee: Kenji Watanabe | Points: 3 | Due: 2026-07-14 | Status: Done
   Reason: Completed. Auth Flows suite 4/4 PASS.

8. HEL-248 - GeoSync license renewal coordination
   Assignee: Raj Patel | Points: 2 | Due: 2026-07-14 | Status: In Progress
   Reason: No test dependency. Low technical risk, but due date is imminent (2026-07-14) and still In Progress - needs confirmation from owner. Administrative risk only.

==================================================================
KEY CROSS-TASK DEPENDENCIES & RECOMMENDATIONS
------------------------------------------------------------------
- Critical Path: HEL-243 (HEL-D-014) -> HEL-245 -> HEL-247. Unblocking Amir Hassan is top priority.
- Bottleneck Person: Amir Hassan owns both HIGH severity defects (HEL-D-014, HEL-D-015) while also assigned to HEL-243. Consider reassigning HEL-D-015 or adding support.
- External Dependency: Meridian sample data due 2026-07-15. Follow up with Meridian contact daily; have contingency to proceed with synthetic MM/DD/YYYY data.
- UAT Risk: Nadia Petrov's HEL-246 must be escalated. Without UAT, HEL-245 and HEL-247 cannot be validated before 2026-07-18.
- Overall: Recommend sprint scope cut consideration for HEL-247 if HEL-246 continues At Risk past 2026-07-14.

Tasks at risk of missing deadline: HEL-243, HEL-245, HEL-246 (HIGH), HEL-247, HEL-242 (MEDIUM)

content.text:
Assessment complete and written to **sprint14_deadline_risk.txt**.

**Summary of findings:**

**HIGH RISK:**
- **HEL-243** (Data ingestion: date format normalization) - Status: `Blocked`, fails QA TC-505 (HEL-D-014, HIGH severity, affects 40% of Meridian data), blocked pending sample data due same day as task due date (2026-07-15).
- **HEL-245** (Integration test suite: data pipeline) - In Progress but blocked by 2 HIGH defects: HEL-D-014 (date normalization) and HEL-D-015 (large file memory overflow at 210k records, TC-507 FAIL).
- **HEL-246** (UAT environment provisioning) - Status: `At Risk`, 8 points, due 2026-07-16, cascade risk to remaining tasks.

**MEDIUM RISK:**
- **HEL-247** (Performance benchmark) - Not Started, TC-604 NOT RUN, depends on HEL-246 and dashboard tasks, due 2026-07-18.
- **HEL-242** (Chart rendering) - 8 points, In Progress, only 1/4 dashboard tests complete as of 07-11, TC-602 IN PROGRESS and TC-603 NOT RUN.

**On Track:** HEL-241 (table rendering PASS) and HEL-244 (Done, 4/4 PASS). HEL-248 low technical risk but needs confirmation.
